summary: Complete testing of Production Go-Live module with 27 backend API endpoints and frontend dashboard. All 54 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend dashboard loads correctly with all 5 tabs (Overview, Configuration, Infrastructure, Providers, Security). System shows NOT_READY status at 39% readiness score which is expected for dev environment without Redis/Sentry/OTel/providers configured.
critical_code_review_comments: All 27 production-golive endpoints properly require authentication
MongoDB shows 'connected' status with 104 active connections
Workers show 6 queues defined and operational
Security checklist shows 62% score (5/8 checks passed)
Proper fallback behavior for missing Redis/Sentry/OTel/providers

success_rate.backend: 100% (27 functional tests + 27 auth tests = 54 tests passed)

seed_data_creation: None needed - tests use existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Go-Live module fully tested. System operates in dev mode (NOT_READY at 39%) which is expected. All 27 endpoints work. Dashboard at /production-golive shows all 5 tabs correctly.

frontend: Tab navigation works (Overview, Configuration, Infrastructure, Providers, Security)
Overview tab: 8 metric boxes visible (Redis, MongoDB, Workers, Backup, Config, Providers, Security, Observability)
Overview tab: Subsystem status badges visible
Configuration tab: Environment variables panel visible with categories
Infrastructure tab: Redis, MongoDB, Workers, Backup, Observability panels visible
Providers tab: Provider status panel with twilio_sms, sendgrid_email, whatsapp
Security tab: Go-Live Checklist panel with score and check details

readiness_endpoints.summary: Aggregates all 9 subsystems into single response

config_endpoints.validate: Full env var validation by category

mongo_endpoints.health: Full report with connection_pool, replica_set, index_validation

provider_endpoints.status: Provider status with delivery_metrics and fallback_chain
